Title: Successful Login
Test Steps:
1. Enter username: testuser
2. Enter password: testpassword
3. Click on login button

Title: Failed Login Attempt
Test Steps:
1. Enter username: wronguser
2. Enter password: wrongpassword
3. Click on login button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, prompting the user to try again.

Title: Successful Search for Rental Item
Preconditions: User is logged in and has entered valid search criteria.
Test Steps:
1. Enter search term: drill
2. Click on search button
Expected Result: Query is executed successfully, and relevant results are displayed.

Title: Failed Search for Rental Item
Preconditions: User is logged in and has entered invalid search criteria.
Test Steps:
1. Enter search term: nonexistentitem
2. Click on search button
Expected Result: Error message is displayed, indicating no results found.

Title: Successful Deletion of Rental Announcement
Preconditions: User is logged in and has selected a valid announcement.
Test Steps:
1. Select announcement ID: 123
2. Click on delete button
